title: Days 2-5 Parallel Development Contract
description: All L1 agents build real code in parallel. No blocking. Streaming commits every 2-4 hours.

day2.Agent-2A: Build unified gateway — single port 8080, route all 120+ endpoints, proxy middleware
day2.Agent-3A: Build TOPOLOGY + AVATAR dashboards (24 of 43 features)
day2.Agent-4A: Write DB migrations: aoe-unified.db → PostgreSQL namespace aoe_unified
day2.Agent-6A: Write feature tests for gateway + topology + avatar (tests run as code arrives)

day3.Agent-2A: Gateway load balancing, error handling, health endpoints, p95 < 100ms target
day3.Agent-3A: Build REGISTRY + MARKETPLACE dashboards (19 of 43 features)
day3.Agent-4A: Write DB migrations: bridgeos.db + BRIDGE_AI_OS.db → PostgreSQL
day3.Agent-5A: Implement unified /referral/claim + user migration from 3 legacy auth systems
day3.Agent-6A: Write integration tests cross-service (gateway + dashboard + auth). Start soak test.

day4.Agent-2A: Gateway hardening — rate limiting, circuit breakers, zero 5xx errors
day4.Agent-3A: Feature verification pass — all 43 features confirmed present and rendering
day4.Agent-4A: Migration dry-run — zero data loss verification (checksums), rollback test < 5min
day4.Agent-5A: Auth load test — 1000 concurrent users, p95 < 200ms
day4.Agent-6A: 200+ unit tests complete, coverage >= 80%, all 43 feature tests passing

day5.all_agents: FEATURE GATE — all 43 features verified, all tests green, migrations validated
day5.gate_condition: Zero blockers to proceed to hardening phase (Days 6-7)

commit_cadence: Every 2-4 hours per agent — no big-bang merges
conflict_protocol: Agent-1B on L2 monitors for conflicts every 60s, escalates to Agent-1 on L1
gate_condition: Day 5 EOD: 43 features verified, 200+ tests passing, migrations clean, auth load test passed
